hooks.command: cd "E:/code/learning-log" && echo "" && echo "=== Session Context ===" && echo "" && in_count=$(grep -c '^\- \[ \]' _inbox.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0) && echo "📥 Inbox: ${in_count} 条待处理" && last_journal=$(ls -t journal/2*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$last_journal" ]; then echo "📝 上次日志: $last_journal"; fi && echo ""
